About Pratistha Enterprises

Established1950Varanasi, India

Pratistha Enterprises is a premier trader and manufacturer of high-quality textiles based in the heart of Varanasi — the home of India's finest weaving traditions.

We specialize in a diverse range of products including premium Yarns, authentic Zari, and elegant Sarees. With a commitment to quality and tradition spanning over seven decades, we serve both individual retail clients and large-scale wholesale buyers across India.

Our dedication to superior craftsmanship and fair pricing has made us a trusted name in the Indian textile industry.

Our Products

Raw Material

Premium Yarns

High-grade yarns in a variety of textures and colours, suitable for all types of weaving and knitting.

Metallic Thread

Classic Zari

Authentic gold & silver metallic threads for embellishing sarees, lehengas, and ethnic wear.

Ethnic Wear

Designer Sarees

A wide range of traditional Banarasi and contemporary sarees crafted with the finest zari work.
